title: PotatoesPlus
description: Add some special potatoes to your game!
body: # PotatoesPlus PotatoesPlus adds **eight** new farmable potato variants to your Minecraft world! You can find them out in the wild, just like any other potato! This was my first ever mod that I've made, so hopefully you like playing around with it as much as I did :) I'd like to add more to this mod, but I'll see what feedback (if any) the mod gets first. # [](https://modfest.net/1.20) [](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
